_comment: Source-of-truth POLICY for who counts as a CA. Version-controlled here; the daily ingest seeds it into the Supabase table `config_ca_teams`. Nothing queries this file at runtime — code and dashboards query the table. Edit this file + push to change the policy; the next scheduled run syncs the table to match. See docs/decisions.md ('Authoritative CA roster').
_rule: A CA = a member of one of the `ca_team` teams below who is NOT also a member of its `parent_team`. HubSpot nests these teams, so each CA sub-team inherits its parent Sales-pod members; subtracting the parent leaves the true CAs. Parent 'Sales' pods (the AEs/leads) are NOT CAs (PM decision 2026-07-15).
